headline: Equifax launches free app to help consumers find old or missing paperwork in time for the FCA's redress scheme
summary: The Financial Conduct Authority's (FCA) motor finance consumer redress scheme is expected to take effect soon, with millions of consumers potentially eligible to receive compensation for mis-sold car loans. Around 14 million car finance agreements (including vans, motorbikes and campervans) may be eligible, with estimated payouts averaging £700. To help streamline the search process for consumers looking for previous car finance agreements, Equifax has released its new, free myEquifax app, which
